content.intro: RentGoose allows you to generate detailed landlord statements for any date range, showing gross rent, management fee deductions, other charges, and net payment to the landlord.

sections.title: How to Generate a Landlord Statement

steps.title: Navigate to RentGoose
steps.content: Open RentGoose from the sidebar beta section.

steps.title: Click the Landlords Tab
steps.content: Select the Landlords tab within RentGoose to see all landlords with active rent schedules.

steps.title: Find the Landlord
steps.content: Search or scroll to find the landlord you want to produce a statement for.

steps.title: Click View
steps.content: Click 'View' to open their financial summary screen, which shows all properties and rent schedules linked to that landlord.

steps.title: Select the Date Range
steps.content: Choose the date range for the statement — either a specific month or a full tax year. The statement will cover all rent activity within the selected period.

steps.title: Review the Statement
steps.content: The statement displays gross rent received, management fees, any other deductions (setup fees, repair charges, etc.), and the net payment amount for the landlord.

steps.title: Download as CSV
steps.content: Click Download to save the statement as a CSV file, suitable for sharing with the landlord or importing into accountancy software.

sections.title: Monthly and Annual Statements
sections.content: Monthly statements are useful for landlords who request regular financial updates. Annual statements covering the UK tax year (April to April) are available for landlords who need a summary for self-assessment tax purposes.
